SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class ApplicationTimelineService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
public class ApplicationTimelineService extends Object
Helper for writing application audit timeline events consistently. Event type constants match values stored in ApplicationEvent.getEventType().

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    TYPE_AUTO_PROMOTED
    Waitlisted applicant auto-promoted to selected.
    static final String
    TYPE_DECISION_RECORDED
    Final select/reject decision recorded.
    static final String
    TYPE_EVALUATION_SAVED
    MO saved interview evaluation.
    static final String
    TYPE_INTERVIEW_BOOKED
    TA booked an interview slot.
    static final String
    TYPE_INTERVIEW_CANCELLED
    TA cancelled a booked interview slot.
    static final String
    TYPE_INTERVIEW_NOTICE
    Interview notice sent to applicant.
    static final String
    TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED
    Status transition recorded on an application.
    static final String
    TYPE_SUBMITTED
    Application submitted by TA.
    static final String
    TYPE_WITHDRAWN
    TA withdrew the application.

    Returns timeline events safe to show on the TA applications page.

    Filters grouped timeline events for the TA applications page.

    Whether the applicant may see this event on the TA timeline (MO internal scoring is hidden).

  • Method Details

    • isVisibleToApplicant

      public static boolean isVisibleToApplicant(ApplicationEvent event)
      Whether the applicant may see this event on the TA timeline (MO internal scoring is hidden).

    • filterForApplicantView

      public static List<ApplicationEvent> filterForApplicantView(List<ApplicationEvent> events)
      Returns timeline events safe to show on the TA applications page.

    • filterForApplicantView

      public static Map<String,List<ApplicationEvent>> filterForApplicantView(Map<String,List<ApplicationEvent>> byApplicationId)
      Filters grouped timeline events for the TA applications page.

    • record

      public void record(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String eventType, String title, String detail, String fromStatus, String toStatus) throws IOException
      Appends one timeline event for an application.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - related job (unused, reserved for callers)
      actorUserId - acting user id
      actorName - acting user display name
      actorRole - TA, MO, ADMIN, or SYSTEM
      eventType - TYPE_SUBMITTED and related constants
      title - short event title
      detail - optional longer detail
      fromStatus - previous status (may be empty)
      toStatus - new status (may be empty)
      Throws:
      IOException - if persistence fails

    • recordStatusChange

      public void recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String fromStatus, String toStatus, String detail) throws IOException
      Records a TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.
      Throws:
      IOException - if persistence fails
